title: Verify existing implementation of notification system
description: This is a meta-verification chore for Kody Engine's @kody decompose feature (P1T25). All files for the 5-area notification system already exist and appear fully implemented: src/models/notification.ts (domain types), src/services/notifications.ts (NotificationService with Payload CRUD), src/routes/notifications.ts (GET/POST with withAuth), src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts (format, filter, sort helpers), plus co-located test files. The task verifies the notification system implementation exists as expected rather than creating new code.

existing_patterns.description: withAuth HOC wraps route handlers with JWT validation and RBAC — used by src/routes/notifications.ts
NotificationService class using Payload SDK for CRUD operations — matches service layer pattern in src/services/
Single-function utility file in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts — matches utility module pattern
Payload collection for notifications — pattern of Payload collection definitions in src/collections/
